## Checklist

- [ ] TypeScript strict compliance (no `any`, no type assertions without comment)
- [ ] No hardcoded Supabase keys or secrets
- [ ] RLS not bypassed (no service role key in client code)
- [ ] Optimistic UI pattern followed for votes
- [ ] No `StyleSheet.create` in new components
- [ ] Uses `FeedPhoto` type (not raw `Photo`) in feed-related code
